globalAttributes.name: x-data
globalAttributes.description: Declares a new Alpine component and defines its reactive data as a JavaScript object. All child elements have access to the properties defined here.

globalAttributes.name: x-init
globalAttributes.description: Runs a JavaScript expression once when Alpine initialises the component. Use it for setup logic that should fire before the component is interactive.

globalAttributes.name: x-show
globalAttributes.description: Toggles the visibility of an element by setting `display: none` based on the truthiness of the expression. Unlike x-if, the element stays in the DOM.

globalAttributes.name: x-bind
globalAttributes.description: Dynamically binds an HTML attribute (or a set of attributes when passed an object) to a JavaScript expression. The `:attr` shorthand is equivalent to `x-bind:attr`.

globalAttributes.name: x-on
globalAttributes.description: Attaches a DOM event listener that executes a JavaScript expression when the event fires. The `@event` shorthand is equivalent to `x-on:event`.

globalAttributes.name: x-text
globalAttributes.description: Sets the `textContent` of an element to the result of the expression, keeping it in sync as reactive data changes.

globalAttributes.name: x-html
globalAttributes.description: Sets the `innerHTML` of an element to the result of the expression. Only use with trusted content — never with user-supplied input.

globalAttributes.name: x-model
globalAttributes.description: Creates a two-way binding between an input element's value and a piece of Alpine data, keeping both in sync automatically.

globalAttributes.name: x-modelable
globalAttributes.description: Exposes a component's internal data property as a bindable value so a parent can use `x-model` to sync with it.

globalAttributes.name: x-for
globalAttributes.description: Repeats a `<template>` element's content for each item in an iterable, using the syntax `item in items`. Must be placed on a `<template>` tag.

globalAttributes.name: x-transition
globalAttributes.description: Applies CSS transition classes at each stage of an element entering or leaving the DOM, enabling smooth show/hide animations with minimal markup.

globalAttributes.name: x-effect
globalAttributes.description: Evaluates an expression reactively — it re-runs automatically any time the reactive data it reads changes, without needing an event.

globalAttributes.name: x-ignore
globalAttributes.description: Prevents Alpine from initialising or touching an element and all of its children. Useful for embedding third-party widgets inside Alpine components.

globalAttributes.name: x-ref
globalAttributes.description: Registers a reference to a DOM element under the given name, making it accessible as `$refs.name` anywhere in the component.

globalAttributes.name: x-cloak
globalAttributes.description: Remains on the element until Alpine has fully initialised, allowing you to hide un-initialised markup with `[x-cloak] { display: none }` in your CSS.

globalAttributes.name: x-teleport
globalAttributes.description: Moves the content of a `<template>` element to another part of the DOM (matching the given selector) while keeping it reactive within the source component.

globalAttributes.name: x-if
globalAttributes.description: Conditionally adds or removes a `<template>` element's content from the DOM entirely based on the truthiness of the expression. Must be placed on a `<template>` tag.

globalAttributes.name: x-id
globalAttributes.description: Declares a list of ID namespaces scoped to the component, used with the `$id()` magic to generate unique, incrementing IDs for accessible form controls.

globalAttributes.name: x-intersect
globalAttributes.description: **Requires `@alpinejs/intersect` plugin.** Executes expressions when the element enters (`x-intersect`) or leaves (`x-intersect.leave`) the browser viewport using IntersectionObserver. Supports `.full`, `.half`, `.threshold-{n}` and `.margin-{n}` modifiers.

globalAttributes.name: x-collapse
globalAttributes.description: **Requires `@alpinejs/collapse` plugin.** Animates an element's height between 0 and its natural height when it is shown or hidden with `x-show`. Replaces the need for CSS transitions on height.

globalAttributes.name: x-mask
globalAttributes.description: **Requires `@alpinejs/mask` plugin.** Enforces an input mask pattern on a text field (e.g. phone numbers, dates, credit cards). The mask is defined as a string like `(999) 999-9999` where `9` matches any digit.

globalAttributes.name: x-sort
globalAttributes.description: **Requires `@alpinejs/sort` plugin.** Makes child elements drag-and-drop sortable. Add `x-sort:item` to each sortable child and provide an `x-sort` handler that receives the item's new sort order.

globalAttributes.name: x-anchor
globalAttributes.description: **Requires `@alpinejs/anchor` plugin.** Anchors an element's position to another element, keeping it visually attached (like a tooltip or dropdown) using `x-anchor.bottom-start="$refs.button"` syntax.
